name: context-pilot
description: Safe-to-forget context window pilot for Claude Code

plugins.name: context-pilot
plugins.description: Context-window pilot: samples context utilization (PostToolUse), injects a boundary-evaluation alert past 70%, gates /clear behind a six-component self-sufficiency audit (skill + /clear-then command), and auto-delivers the handoff into the cold session via a source-agnostic SessionStart hook with consume-once semantics.
